root_text.sn35.138:1.2: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.138:1.4: Cakkhu, bhikkhave, na tumhākaṁ; taṁ pajahatha.
root_text.sn35.138:1.5: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.138:1.7: Sā vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.138:1.9: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.138:1.10: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, yaṁ imasmiṁ jetavane tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṁ taṁ jano hareyya vā ḍaheyya vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā kareyya, api nu tumhākaṁ evamassa:
root_text.sn35.138:1.11: ‘amhe jano harati vā ḍahati vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karotī’”ti?
root_text.sn35.138:1.14: “Na hi no etaṁ, bhante, attā vā attaniyaṁ vā”ti.
root_text.sn35.138:1.15: “Evameva kho, bhikkhave, cakkhu na tumhākaṁ; taṁ pajahatha.
root_text.sn35.138:1.16: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.138:1.18: Sā vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.138:1.20: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissatī”ti.

translation_text.sn35.138:1.2: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.4: The eye isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.5: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.8: mind isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.9: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.10: Suppose a person was to carry off the grass, sticks, branches, and leaves in this Jeta’s Grove, or burn them, or do what they want with them. Would you think:
translation_text.sn35.138:1.11: ‘This person is carrying us off, burning us, or doing what they want with us’?”
translation_text.sn35.138:1.14: Because  to us that’s neither self nor belonging to self.”
translation_text.sn35.138:1.15: “In the same way, the eye isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.16: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.19: mind isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.138:1.20: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.”
